title: 118 Sports system development
summary: Brand identity, responsive web development and cloud deployment for a live sports service.

lensAssignments.rationale: The responsibility centres on executable digital behaviour implemented in a website, application, interface or connected software system.
This is a distinct supporting responsibility: The responsibility centres on meaning, recognition, identity, visual language or the designed human experience.
lensAssignments.lensSummary: Brand and experience-system responsibility: Brand identity, responsive web development and cloud deployment for a live sports service.

lensAssignments.rationale: This is a distinct supporting responsibility: The responsibility centres on deployment, runtime configuration, sustained delivery or the operating environment.
lensAssignments.lensSummary: Infrastructure and operations responsibility: Brand identity, responsive web development and cloud deployment for a live sports service.
